scripts.dev:web: CLOUDFLARE_INCLUDE_PROCESS_ENV=true doppler run --project gaff --config dev --scope ~/.t-stack/orgs/timothygithinji -- bun scripts/neon-env.ts bun run dev:vite
scripts.dev:prod: CLOUDFLARE_INCLUDE_PROCESS_ENV=true doppler run --project gaff --config prd --scope ~/.t-stack/orgs/timothygithinji -- bun run dev:vite
scripts.db:migrate: bun scripts/validation/migrations.ts --check-only && doppler run --project gaff --config dev --scope ~/.t-stack/orgs/timothygithinji -- bun scripts/neon-env.ts bunx drizzle-kit migrate
scripts.db:migrate:prod: bun scripts/validation/migrations.ts --check-only && doppler run --project gaff --config prd --scope ~/.t-stack/orgs/timothygithinji -- bunx drizzle-kit migrate
scripts.db:studio: doppler run --project gaff --config dev --scope ~/.t-stack/orgs/timothygithinji -- bun scripts/neon-env.ts bunx drizzle-kit studio
scripts.db:branch:create: doppler run --project gaff --config dev --scope ~/.t-stack/orgs/timothygithinji -- bun scripts/database/neon-branch-create.ts
scripts.db:branch:reset: doppler run --project gaff --config dev --scope ~/.t-stack/orgs/timothygithinji -- bun scripts/database/neon-branch-reset.ts
scripts.db:env: doppler run --project gaff --config dev --scope ~/.t-stack/orgs/timothygithinji -- bun scripts/neon-env.ts
scripts.smoke:portals: doppler run --project gaff --config prd --scope ~/.t-stack/orgs/timothygithinji -- bun scripts/verify/portal-param-smoke.ts
